headline: The US lifted export controls on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models after a two-week freeze.
body: The Department of Commerce reversed a roughly two-week restriction on Anthropic's most advanced Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, and Anthropic said it would restore access starting the next day. The move dominated the window across multiple outlets, tying frontier models to export policy and AI safety. Alongside the policy story, Sonnet 5 shipped with Fable 5 flagged for release, and Wayve launched an $85M employee tender offer at an $8.5B valuation. On the tooling side, profiling and continuous monitoring lead the rotation while post-training, Plan Mode, sampling evaluation, and reproducibility break out.

cited_items.title: White House drops restrictions on Anthropic AI models after two-week ban - The Washington Post
Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
US lifts curbs on Anthropic's Fable, Mythos AI models
WhiteHouse lifts export control on Anthropic that froze its most advanced models
Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
